label: Mirrorbrine Lake
description: Mirrorbrine Lake forms a shallow saline basin set into Brineshade’s dark basaltic plain, its margins crusted with angular salt plates cemented by mineral precipitate. The lake’s surface holds long intervals of near-stillness under the planet’s thin haze, reflecting Saltharrow’s hard white radiance with stark clarity. Basalt shelves descend in stepped terraces into dense brine, where pale evaporite bands mark recurrent tidal stresses imposed by the system’s pronounced gravitic gradients. Low wind-scoured berms and salt-polished stones define the shoreline, giving the basin a severe, geometric aspect.
